## unfocusDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `unfocus` command.

Drives CLI subcommand `unfocus` and MCP tool `focus_clear`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
unfocusDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{}, FocusResult, z.ZodObject<{}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {}, {}>>
```
